features.claim: Antigravity lets users choose from multiple leading frontier reasoning models to power the agent's core reasoning.
features.name: Reasoning Model
features.quote: For the core reasoning model, Antigravity offers leading frontier models from the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform

features.claim: Users can interactively select which reasoning model the agent uses via a dropdown under the conversation prompt box.
features.name: model selector dropdown
features.quote: Users can select which reasoning model they want to use within the model selector dropdown under the conversation prompt box

features.claim: Antigravity includes a generative image tool (powered by Nano Banana 2) that the agent uses to produce UI mockups, web page images, and architecture diagrams.
features.name: generative image tool
features.quote: Nano Banana 2: Used by the generative image tool when the Agent wants to produce a UI mockup, needs images to populate a web page or application, generate system or architecture diagrams, or other generative image tasks.
